g.title: url_verify.verification_attempt:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: url_verify.verification_attempt:session->url_verify.session:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (session) REFERENCES url_verify.session(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: url_verify.url_verification:attempt->url_verify.verification_attempt:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (attempt) REFERENCES url_verify.verification_attempt(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
